ServiceGacc.heroSubtitle: Navigeer China se Dekreet 248/249 voedselregistrasievereistes met kundige leiding.
ServiceGacc.coverItems: CIFER-rekening skepping en bestuur,18-kategorie risiko assessering (hoë risiko vs. lae risiko),HS/CIQ kode passing vir jou produkte,Volledige dokumentasie voorbereiding en vertaling,Etiketnakomingsoorsig (GB 7718 / GB 28050),Registrasiehernuwing en 5-jaar geldigheidsopsporing
ServiceGacc.howSteps: Produk Assessering — Ons hersien jou produk kategorie en bepaal die toepasselijke GACC vereistes.,CIFER Registrasie — Ons skep en bestuur jou registrasie deur China se CIFER stelsel.,Dokumentasie — Alle vorms, vertalings en ondersteunende dokumente word voorberei en ingedien.,Goedkeuring & Opsporing — Ons monitor die goedkeuringsproses en bestuur jou registrasiehernuwing.
ServiceGacc.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceGacc.faq1a: GACC Decree 248 is a Chinese regulation requiring all overseas food manufacturers to register with the General Administration of Customs of China (GACC) before exporting food products to China. It applies to all 18 food categories and took effect January 1, 2022.
ServiceGacc.faq2q: How long does GACC registration take?
ServiceGacc.faq2a: Registration typically takes 2-4 weeks depending on the product category and completeness of documentation. We handle the entire process including document preparation, translation, and submission through the CIFER system.
ServiceGacc.faq3q: What documents are needed for registration?
ServiceGacc.faq3a: Key documents include: business license, production facility information, product list with HS codes, quality management certificates (ISO 22000/HACCP), and product labels. We provide a complete checklist and assist with document preparation.
ServiceGacc.faq4a: No, GACC registration is valid for 5 years. Renewal must be submitted 6 months before expiration. We provide renewal reminders and handle the entire renewal process on your behalf.

ServiceLabel.heroSubtitle: Verseker dat jou produketikette aan China se verpligte etiketstandaarde voldoen.
ServiceLabel.coverItems: GB 7718-2025 verpakte voedsel etiketnakoming,GB 28050-2025 voedings etiketvereistes,9 verpligte elemente verifikasie (naam, bestanddele, netto gewig, datums, stoor, ens.),Pasgemaakte Chinese etiketontwerp,Etiket sjabloon skepping vir produksie,Douane klaring etiket ondersteuning
ServiceLabel.howSteps: Etiket Oorsig — Ons hersien jou huidige etikette teen Chinese regulatoriese vereistes.,Gapsanalise — Identifiseer ontbrekende of nie-nakomende elemente.,Ontwerp & Hersiening — Skep nakomende Chinese etikette met alle verpligte elemente.,Produksie-gereed Lêers — Lewer druk-gereed etiketlêers vir jou vervaardigingspan.
ServiceLabel.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceLabel.faq1a: Chinese label compliance means your product labels must meet China's GB 7718 and GB 28050 standards. This includes mandatory elements like product name, ingredients, nutrition facts, manufacturer info, and Chinese translations.
ServiceLabel.faq2q: Can I use my existing labels with a Chinese sticker?
ServiceLabel.faq2a: In some cases, yes. Supplemental Chinese stickers can be applied at the port of entry for certain products. However, pre-printed Chinese labels are preferred and often required for retail sales. We assess your specific situation and recommend the best approach.
ServiceLabel.faq3q: What happens if my labels are non-compliant?
ServiceLabel.faq3a: Non-compliant labels can result in customs rejection, product seizure, fines, or forced product recalls. Ensuring label compliance before shipping prevents these costly issues.
ServiceLabel.faq4q: Do you design the labels too?
ServiceLabel.faq4a: Yes, we provide complete label services: compliance review against GB standards, custom label design in Chinese, and production-ready files for your printer. We also provide guidance on port-of-entry sticker applications.

ServiceCcc.heroSubtitle: China Verpligte Sertifisering vir elektronika, huishoudelike toestelle, speelgoed en motoronderdele.
ServiceCcc.coverItems: CCC-gids assessing — bevestig of jou produk sertifisering vereis,Toetsingkoördinasie met CNCA-geakkrediteerde laboratoriums,Aansoekvoorbereiding en indiening,Fabrieksinspeksievoorbereiding,Jaarlikse toesig nakomingsondersteuning,Nuwe 2025 kategorieë insluitend litium-ioon batterye
ServiceCcc.howSteps: Geskiktheidsassessering — Bepaal of jou produk binne die CCC verpligte katalogus val.,Toetsing — Koördineer tipoetoetsing by 'n geakkrediteerde Chinese laboratorium.,Aansoek — Voorberei en dien die sertifiseringaansoek in met alle vereiste dokumentasie.,Sertifisering — Ontvang jou CCC sertifikaat en handhaaf jaarlikse nakoming.
ServiceCcc.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceCcc.faq1a: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is a mandatory safety certification for products sold in China. It covers electronics, automotive parts, toys, safety glass, and other product categories listed in the CCC catalog.
ServiceCcc.faq2q: Does my product need CCC certification?
ServiceCcc.faq2a: Products listed in China's CCC catalog require certification before they can be imported, sold, or used commercially. We provide a free catalog assessment to determine if your products fall under CCC requirements.
ServiceCcc.faq3q: How long does CCC certification take?
ServiceCcc.faq3a: The CCC process typically takes 4-8 months including factory audit, product testing at CNAS-accredited labs, and certification review. Timeline varies by product category and complexity.
ServiceCcc.faq4q: Can CCC certification be done from overseas?
ServiceCcc.faq4a: Yes, but it requires coordination with Chinese testing labs and certification bodies. We act as your local representative, managing factory audits, sample testing, and all communications with certifying authorities.

ServiceCosmetics.heroSubtitle: Volledige NMPA registrasie en inskrywing vir ingevoerde kosmetika in China.
ServiceCosmetics.coverItems: Gewone kosmetika inskrywing (velversorging, grimering, haarversorging),Spesiale kosmetika registrasie (sonskerm, whitening, haarkleur),Chinese verantwoordelike agent aanwysing,Veiligheids evaluering koördinasie,Doeltreffendheidstoetsing ondersteuning vir geëisde funksies,Na-mark nakoming (nadelige gebeurtenis monitering, jaarverslae)
ServiceCosmetics.howSteps: Produk Klassifikasie — Bepaal of jou produk gewone of spesiale gebruik kosmetika is.,Verantwoordelike Agent — Benoem 'n China-gebaseerde verantwoordelike entiteit.,Veiligheids & Doeltreffendheidstoetsing — Koördineer vereiste toetsing by geakkrediteerde laboratoriums.,Inskrywing/Registrasie — Dien aansoek by NMPA in en bestuur die goedkeuringsproses.
ServiceCosmetics.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceCosmetics.faq1a: NMPA (National Medical Products Administration) filing is required for all cosmetics imported into China. General cosmetics require notification filing, while special-use cosmetics (sunscreen, hair dye, whitening) require registration approval.
ServiceCosmetics.faq2q: What's the difference between notification and registration?
ServiceCosmetics.faq2a: Notification filing (for general cosmetics) takes approximately 4-6 months and involves product safety assessment and ingredient review. Registration (for special cosmetics) takes 12-18 months and requires efficacy testing and safety evaluation.
ServiceCosmetics.faq3q: Do I need a Chinese responsible person?
ServiceCosmetics.faq3a: Yes, all imported cosmetics must designate a Chinese境内责任人 (domestic responsible person) who assumes legal responsibility for product quality and safety. We can serve as your境内责任人.
ServiceCosmetics.faq4q: Can I sell cosmetics through cross-border e-commerce without NMPA?
ServiceCosmetics.faq4a: Yes, cross-border e-commerce (CBEC) channels allow cosmetics sales without NMPA filing under certain conditions. This is a faster market entry route while you prepare full NMPA compliance.

ServiceEcommerce.heroSubtitle: Lanseer jou handelsmerk op China se leidende kruisgrens e-handelsplatforms.
ServiceEcommerce.coverItems: Platform aanboord (Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, Douyin Global),Gebonde pakhuis (1210) en direkte versending (9610) opstelling,Drie-dokument versoenings (bestelling, betaling, logistiek),Kruisgrens belastingoptimalisering (0% tarief binne perke),Chinese etiketvrystellingleiding vir kruisgrensverkope,Datanakoming (PIPL) vir kruisgrens operasies
ServiceEcommerce.howSteps: Platform Seleksie — Kies die regte platform(s) vir jou handelsmerk en produkte.,Aanboord — Voltooi platformregistrasie en nakomingsvereistes.,Logistiek Opstelling — Vestig gebonde pakhuis of direkte versending kanale.,Lansering — Gaan aanlyn met nakomende produklysies en bemarking.
ServiceEcommerce.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceEcommerce.faq1a: We support all major Chinese e-commerce platforms: Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, Douyin (TikTok China), Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), and Pinduoduo. We handle platform registration, store setup, and ongoing compliance.
ServiceEcommerce.faq2a: Cross-border e-commerce requires three documents to match for each order: the order document, payment document, and logistics document. This is a customs requirement for CBEC goods. We ensure your operations comply with this requirement.
ServiceEcommerce.faq3q: How long to set up a cross-border store?
ServiceEcommerce.faq3a: Platform registration typically takes 2-4 weeks. Store setup, product listing, and operational readiness usually takes an additional 2-4 weeks depending on product complexity and platform requirements.
ServiceEcommerce.faq4q: Do cross-border products need Chinese labels?
ServiceEcommerce.faq4a: CBEC products are generally exempt from Chinese label requirements since they are considered personal imports. However, product information must be provided in Chinese on the e-commerce platform. We guide you on platform-specific requirements.

ServiceBrand.heroSubtitle: Beskerm jou intellektuele eiendom en handelsmerkidentiteit in die Chinese mark.
ServiceBrand.coverItems: Handelsmerksoek en beskikbaarheidsassessering,Handelsmerkregistrasie (CNIPA direkte indiening),Madrid stelsel aanwysing vir China,Douane intellektuele eiendom inskrywing,Advertensienakomingsoorsig (Chinese Advertensiewet),Handelsmerkbeskermingstrategie en -afdwingingsleiding
ServiceBrand.howSteps: Handelsmerksoek — Verifieer beskikbaarheid en identifiseer potensiële konflikte.,Registrasie — Dien handelsmerkaansoek in by CNIPA of via Madrid stelsel.,Douane Inskrywing — Registreer jou handelsmerk by China Douane vir grensbeskerming.,Deurlopende Beskerming — Monitor vir oortredings en handhaaf advertensienakoming.
ServiceBrand.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceBrand.faq1q: Why do I need trademark registration in China?
ServiceBrand.faq1a: China follows a "first-to-file" trademark system. Without registration, someone else can register your trademark first and prevent you from using it. Early registration is essential for brand protection.
ServiceBrand.faq2q: How long does trademark registration take?
ServiceBrand.faq2a: The process typically takes 8-12 months from application to registration. This includes formal examination, publication period, and certificate issuance. We handle the entire process and monitor for oppositions.
ServiceBrand.faq3a: The Madrid System allows you to extend an existing trademark registration to multiple countries, including China, through a single application. It can be faster and more cost-effective than direct filing in China.
ServiceBrand.faq4q: How do I protect against counterfeit products?
ServiceBrand.faq4a: We provide comprehensive brand protection: trademark registration, customs IP recordal (allowing customs to seize counterfeit goods), advertising compliance review, and ongoing monitoring. Early registration is the most important first step.

Faq.heroSubtitle: Antwoorde op algemene vrae oor invoer na China en regulatoriese nakoming.
Faq.gaccA1: GACC Dekreet 248 is China se regulasie oor die registrasie van oorsese voedselvervaardigers, verwerkers en stoorfasiliteite. Dit is verpligtend sedert 1 Januarie 2022. Alle voedselexporteurs na China moet deur China se CIFER-stelsel geregistreer word.
Faq.gaccA2: Die tydsraamwerk verskil volgens produk kategorie. Lae-risiko (nie-18-kategorie) produkte kan tipies binne 2-4 weke geregistreer word. Hoë-risiko (18-kategorie) produkte vereis regeringsaanbeveling en kan verskeie maande neem.
Faq.gaccQ3: Is GACC registrasie verpligtend vir alle voedselprodukte?
Faq.gaccA3: Ja. Alle voedselprodukte wat na China uitgevoer word vereis GACC registrasie, ongeag die produk tipe of volume. Sonder dit kan jou goedere nie Chinese doeane deurgaan nie.
Faq.gaccQ4: Wat is die geldigheidsperiode van GACC registrasie?
Faq.gaccA4: GACC registrasie is geldig vir 5 jaar. Hernuwingsaansoeke moet 3-6 maande voor vervaldatum ingedien word.
Faq.labelQ1: Hoekom het ek Chinese etikette nodig?
Faq.labelA1: Chinese etikettering is verpligtend vir die meeste ingevoerde produkte wat in China verkoop word. Nie-nakomende etikette kan lei tot douane-verwerping, produkterugroepings en boetes.
Faq.labelQ2: Wat is die verpligte etiket elemente?
Faq.labelA2: Vir verpakte voedsel vereis GB 7718-2025: produknaam, bestanddeellys, netto inhoud, produksie/vervaldatum, stoorvoorwaardes, vervaardigerinligting en Chinese agentbesonderhede.
Faq.cccA1: CCC sertifisering is verpligtend vir produkte in 17 kategorieë insluitend huishoudelike toestelle, IT-toerusting, beligting, motoronderdele, kinderspeelgoed en litium-ioon batterye (bygevoeg in 2024).
Faq.cccA2: Tipies 2-6 maande afhangende van produk kompleksiteit, toetsingsvereistes en fabrieksinspeksiebehoeftes.
Faq.cosmeticsQ1: Wat is die verskil tussen gewone en spesiale kosmetika?
Faq.cosmeticsA1: Gewone kosmetika (velversorging, grimering, haarversorging) vereis inskrywing by NMPA. Spesiale kosmetika (sonskerm, whitening, haarkleur, vlekverwydering) vereis volle registrasie, wat langer neem en meer toetsing behels.
Faq.ecommerceQ1: Het ek nog steeds GACC registrasie nodig vir kruisgrens e-handel?
Faq.ecommerceA1: Ja. Voedselprodukte wat deur kruisgrens e-handel verkoop word vereis steeds GACC registrasie. Sommige ander vereistes (soos Chinese etikette) kan egter vir kruisgrensverkope vrygestel word.
Faq.ecommerceQ2: Wat is die aankoop limiete vir kruisgrens e-handel?
Faq.ecommerceA2: Enkel transaksie limiet: ¥5 000. Jaarlikse limiet per verbruiker: ¥26 000. Binne hierdie perke is tariewe 0% en BTW/verbruiksbelasting word teen 70% gehef.
Faq.brandQ1: Moet ek my handelsmerk registreer voordat ek China betree?
Faq.brandA1: Absoluut. China volg 'n eerste-tot-lê handelsmerkstelsel. As jy nie registreer nie, kan iemand anders jou handelsmerk registreer en jou marktoetrede blokkeer.
Faq.brandA2: Direkte indiening by CNIPA neem 7-12 maande. Madrid stelsel aanwysing neem 12-18 maande. Ons beveel aan om die proses voor jou produklansering te begin.
Faq.generalA1: Ons bied vaste-fooipryse sonder verborge koste. Die presiese fooi hang af van jou produk kategorie en nakomingsbehoeftes. Kontak ons vir 'n vrye assessering en persoonlike kwotasie.
Faq.generalQ2: Werk julle met maatskappye buite voedsel?
Faq.generalA2: Ja. Terwyl ons met GACC voedselregistrasie begin het, bied ons nou nakomingsdienste aan vir kosmetika, elektronika, speelgoed, tekstiele, chemikalieë en meer.
Faq.generalA3: Ons span is in China gebaseer met direkte toegang tot regulatoriese owerhede, toetsingslaboratoriums en sertifiseringsliggame. Ons werk wêreldwyd met kliënte.
Faq.generalQ4: Kan julle die hele proses vir my hanteer?
Faq.generalA4: Ja. Ons bied volledige einde-tot-einde diens — van aanvanklike assessering en dokumentasie tot registrasie, sertifisering en deurlopende nakomingsbestuur.

About.heroSubtitle: Jou vertroude vennoot vir die navigeer van China se invoerregulasies.

About.value1Desc: Diep kennis van China se regulatoriese landskap oor verskeie bedrywe.
About.value2Desc: Vaste-fooipryse met duidelike lewerings — geen verborge koste of verrassings nie.
About.value3Desc: Ons bly by jou van aanvanklike konsultasie tot finale nakomende marktoetrede.
About.missionDesc: Om China se invoerregulasies toeganklik en navigeerbaar te maak vir internasionale besighede van alle groottes. Ons glo dat nakoming nie 'n versperring vir marktoetrede moet wees nie — dit moet 'n brug wees.

About.values: Expertise — Deep knowledge of China's regulatory landscape across multiple industries.,Transparency — Fixed-fee pricing with clear deliverables — no hidden costs or surprises.,Commitment — We stay with you from initial consultation to final compliant market entry.
